Eogunn gains +2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} for each target affected.

languages.text:
Все существа в конусе (6 клеток) перед Эоганном получают {uip|DamageDealt|fbca800b9c8d46c0a22a7cf5982984f3} {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}раздирающего урона{/g} с {uip|ArmorPen|fbca800b9c8d46c0a22a7cf5982984f3}% пробития брони. Пораженные цели получают +{uip|ArmorPen|fbca800b9c8d46c0a22a7cf5982984f3} уровней {g|f:7e42fcb1d83040e38e8d68d7edd96375}постимпульса{/g} до конца боя.
Эоганн получает +1 уровень {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g} за каждую пораженную цель.

languages.text:
Todas las criaturas en un cono de 6 casillas delante de Eogunn sufren {uip|DamageDealt|fbca800b9c8d46c0a22a7cf5982984f3} de {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}daño acerado{/g} con {uip|ArmorPen|fbca800b9c8d46c0a22a7cf5982984f3} % de penetración de armadura. Los objetivos afectados sufren +{uip|ArmorPen|fbca800b9c8d46c0a22a7cf5982984f3} acumulaciones de {g|f:7e42fcb1d83040e38e8d68d7edd96375}pulso de eco{/g} hasta el final del combate.
Eogunn gana +1 acumulación de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g} por cada objetivo afectado.

languages.text:
Alle Kreaturen in einem Kegel von 6 Feldern vor Eogunn erleiden {uip|DamageDealt|fbca800b9c8d46c0a22a7cf5982984f3} {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}rüstungsbrechenden Schaden{/g} mit {uip|ArmorPen|fbca800b9c8d46c0a22a7cf5982984f3} % Rüstungsdurchdringung. Die betroffenen Ziele werden bis zum Ende des Kampfes mit +{uip|ArmorPen|fbca800b9c8d46c0a22a7cf5982984f3} Stapeln {g|f:7e42fcb1d83040e38e8d68d7edd96375}Echoimpuls{/g} belegt.
Eogunn erhält +1 Stapel {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g} für jedes betroffene Ziel.

languages.text:
Toutes les créatures dans un cône de 6 cases devant Eogunn subissent {uip|DamageDealt|fbca800b9c8d46c0a22a7cf5982984f3} points de {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}dégâts de lacération{/g} avec {uip|ArmorPen|fbca800b9c8d46c0a22a7cf5982984f3} % de pénétration d'armure. Les cibles touchées subissent +{uip|ArmorPen|fbca800b9c8d46c0a22a7cf5982984f3} cumuls d'{g|f:7e42fcb1d83040e38e8d68d7edd96375}Écho-impulsion{/g} jusqu'à la fin du combat.
Eogunn gagne +1 cumul d'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Énergie potentielle{/g} par cible touchée.

languages.text:
Eogunn'un önündeki 6 hücrelik bir koni içinde bulunan tüm yaratıklar, %{uip|ArmorPen|fbca800b9c8d46c0a22a7cf5982984f3} zırh delme değerine sahip {uip|DamageDealt|fbca800b9c8d46c0a22a7cf5982984f3} {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}yırtma hasarına{/g} maruz kalır. Etkilenen hedefler, +{uip|ArmorPen|fbca800b9c8d46c0a22a7cf5982984f3} {g|f:7e42fcb1d83040e38e8d68d7edd96375}dalgayankı{/g} birikimine maruz kalır. Bu etki, çatışma sonuna dek sürer.
Eogunn, etkilenen her hedef için +1 {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikimi kazanır.

Etkilenen hedefler, +{uip|ArmorPen|fbca800b9c8d46c0a22a7cf5982984f3} {g|f:7e42fcb1d83040e38e8d68d7edd96375}dalgayankı{/g} birikimine maruz kalır. Bu etki, çatışma sonuna dek sürer.
Eogunn, etkilenen her hedef için +1 {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikimi kazanır.

languages.text:
伊奥贡前方6格锥形范围内的所有生物受到附带{uip|ArmorPen|fbca800b9c8d46c0a22a7cf5982984f3}%护甲穿透的{uip|DamageDealt|fbca800b9c8d46c0a22a7cf5982984f3}点{g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}撕裂伤害{/g}。被影响的目标受到{uip|ArmorPen|fbca800b9c8d46c0a22a7cf5982984f3}层{g|f:7e42fcb1d83040e38e8d68d7edd96375}回波脉冲{/g}效果，持续至战斗结束。
每影响到1个目标，伊奥贡获得1层{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}。

The affected targets suffer +{uip|ArmorPen|fbca800b9c8d46c0a22a7cf5982984f3} stacks of {g|f:7e42fcb1d83040e38e8d68d7edd96375}echopulse{/g} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
伊奥贡前方6格锥形范围内的所有生物受到附带{uip|ArmorPen|fbca800b9c8d46c0a22a7cf5982984f3}%护甲穿透的{uip|DamageDealt|fbca800b9c8d46c0a22a7cf5982984f3}点{g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}撕裂伤害{/g}。被影响的目标受到{uip|ArmorPen|fbca800b9c8d46c0a22a7cf5982984f3}层{g|f:7e42fcb1d83040e38e8d68d7edd96375}回波脉冲{/g}效果，持续至战斗结束。
每影响到1个目标，伊奥贡获得1层{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}。

languages.text:
エオガンの前方6マスの円錐範囲内のすべてのクリーチャーは、{uip|DamageDealt|fbca800b9c8d46c0a22a7cf5982984f3}の{g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}切り裂きダメージ{/g}を{uip|ArmorPen|fbca800b9c8d46c0a22a7cf5982984f3}%の装甲貫通で受ける。影響を受けた対象は、戦闘終了まで{g|f:7e42fcb1d83040e38e8d68d7edd96375}エコーパルス{/g}を+{uip|ArmorPen|fbca800b9c8d46c0a22a7cf5982984f3}スタック受ける。
エオガンは、影響を受けた対象1体につき{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}位置エネルギー{/g}を+1スタック得る。
